description: Team assignments and work items. Routable to humans or agents.

schema.category: Task category (implementation, documentation, testing, review, etc.)
schema.title: Task title
schema.description: Detailed description of work to do
schema.priority: Critical|high|medium|low (may be computed from matrix math)
schema.complexity: Trivial|small|medium|large (may be computed from scope analysis)
schema.related_issue: If from an issue, link here (e.g., I001)
schema.dependencies: Array of task IDs that must complete first
schema.owner: WHO is responsible if not assignee
schema.cost_estimate: Token cost estimate for agent tasks

matrix_math_integration.note: Priority and complexity values may be computed from matrix-state.json

distinction_from_issues.issues: Discoveries, problems. NOT assigned. Team visibility.
distinction_from_issues.tasks: Work assignments. Assigned to human or agent. Actionable.
